artPrompt: A hulking mutant beast crouches at the reservoir's edge, long sinewy neck bent low as it gulps the toxic water down, swollen flanks dripping bioluminescent ooze, one clawed limb braced on a rusted pipe. The receding waterline glistens around it under a bruised sky. The gesture is greedy, draining motion. Wide landscape, murky green and rust-red washes bleeding into sickly glow. Rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Reservoir Drinker
text:
Reach
{T}: Add {G}{G}. Spend this mana only to cast creature spells or activate abilities of creatures. (It drinks the reservoir and ramps the food chain.)
flavorText: It drinks the whole reservoir by noon. The town just bills you for it.
